Chile Instituto de Seguridad Laboral (ISL) / Mutual Insurance Organization (Mutual de Seguridad, ACHS, IST)
Is your company required to comply with accident insurance through Instituto de Seguridad Laboral (ISL) or a mutual insurance organization (Mutual de Seguridad, ACHS, IST) in Chile?
The certificate must be issued within 3 months prior to the submission date.\n
Please upload a copy of your Certificado de Cotizaciones de Seguro Social, Certificado de Afiliación y Cotizaciones, or Certificado de Cumplimiento de Obligaciones.
